title: cacalia brevifolia
intro: Cacalia brevifolia, also known as the Dwarf Cacalia or Small Cacalia, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. Traditionally, Cacalia brevifolia is prepared as a tea or infusion to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, and is also used in the form of capsules or tablets as a dietary supplement.
